description_long: This is a tall, dark glass wine bottle with a cylindrical body and a long, narrow neck. The bottle features a cork closure at the top and a glossy, reflective surface with subtle light reflections. A rectangular label is affixed to the front, displaying a monochrome portrait and some text, with the label standing out against the deep black color of the bottle. The bottle's shoulders are gently sloped, leading to a straight neck, and the base appears flat and stable. The overall appearance is elegant and modern, suitable for premium wine packaging. The bottle is likely empty or filled with wine, and is designed to be both functional and visually appealing.
description: A tall, glossy black wine bottle with a cork closure and a prominent front label featuring a portrait and text.
description_view_0: Front view showing the label with a portrait and text clearly visible on the bottle's body.
description_view_1: Angled side view revealing the bottle's glossy surface and the edge of the label, with the cork closure visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the unadorned, smooth black surface of the bottle with no label or markings.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view showing the other edge of the label and the bottle's reflective finish.
attribute_label_or_branding: A rectangular label on the front of the bottle, predominantly white with a grayscale portrait and text. The label is vertically oriented, covering a significant portion of the bottle's front. The text appears to include a name and possibly a signature, with the design being modern and visually striking.
attribute_bottle_neck_shape: Long, narrow, straight neck with a slight taper at the top and a standard cylindrical profile.
